title: Blacksmith Tweaks
description: This mod adds Buffs to the tools and armor you find and craft! These buffs can range from something as simple as increased damage and durability to as interesting as making mobs flee or taking their health for your own!
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blacksmith_Tweaks/BH_BST_page1.webp)[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blacksmith_Tweaks/BH_BST_page3_discord.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dummycore) [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blacksmith_Tweaks/BH_BST_page2_dummycore.webp)](https://discord.gg/NUZRAsvRbZ)![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blacksmith_Tweaks/BH_BST_page4.webp)[![Whoops! You have an adblocker. Please consider supporting my work.](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Blacksmith_Tweaks/BH_BST_page5_promo.webp "Use code GamingB3ast for 25% off your first server!")](https://bisecthosting.com/Gamingb3ast)
Hi, are you using an adblocker and haven't seen my banner? Well, Please consider supporting my work. I spend a lot of time on it :) Use code GamingB3ast for 25% off your first server with Bisect Hosting :) https://bisecthosting.com/Gamingb3ast

     OLD NOTE STILL VALID: 

You get these buffs every time you craft a tool! This includes modded tools and tinker's construct tools (however sometimes they need to be reforged in the reforging anvil to get buffs!  
The reforging anvil can be used to, at any time, spend some XP to reforge the buffs on your tools, even if they didn't have buffs before.  
If you hold shift when crafting the tools, you will craft it without any buffs, however, beware that there are negative effects on your health if you do this. Too much crafting without buffs will cause you to die!

You can also blacklist or whitelist any items you wish to get these buffs in the config!

Thank you to Modbder for the original '[buffed tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buffed-tools)' mod, which I expanded for use in my modpack under this [license](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buffed-tools/#license).

# THIS MOD WAS NOT TESTED WITH THE ORIGINAL BUFFED TOOLS MOD, PLEASE ONLY USE ONE OF THE MODS AT A TIME 
(Preferably this mod, as it's more fun :)
